CustomField.description: Min date between Single Trainer Onboarding Start Date on Account and Initial Setup Call Completed on CF.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c), ISBLANK(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c) ), NULL, IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c)), ISBLANK(Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c) ), Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c, IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c)), ISBLANK(Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c), ISBLANK(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c) ), Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c, IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c)), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Status__c, 'Missed')), ISBLANK(Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c) ), Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c, IF( AND( BLANKVALUE(Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) < BLANKVALUE((Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c), DATE(1900, 01, 01)), BLANKVALUE(Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) < BLANKVALUE((Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c), DATE(1900, 01, 01)) ), Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c, IF( AND( BLANKVALUE(Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) < BLANKVALUE((Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c), DATE(1900, 01, 01)), BLANKVALUE(Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) < BLANKVALUE((Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c), DATE(1900, 01, 01)) ), Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c, IF( AND( BLANKVALUE(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) < BLANKVALUE((Account__r.Single_Trainer_Onboarding_Start_Date__c), DATE(1900, 01, 01)), BLANKVALUE(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) < BLANKVALUE((Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c), DATE(1900, 01, 01)) ), Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c, (Reference_Initial_Setup_Call_Completed__c) ) ))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Min date between Single Trainer Onboarding Start Date on Account and Initial Setup Call Completed on CF.
CustomField.label: Single-Trainer Onboarding Start Date
